name: Raye Table Lamp - 20 Inch Height - TBL4485 - Black - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the Raye table lamp. Standing at 20.5 inches, this lamp features a sleek black design that suits any decor. Crafted with a resin and iron base, it offers a sturdy presence while the cotton shade provides a soft, ambient glow. Perfect for your bedroom, living room, or office, this lamp brings a touch of elegance to everyday lighting. Its understated design effortlessly complements various styles, making it a versatile addition to your home. Whether reading, relaxing, or working, the Raye table lamp supports any activity with style and grace. Make it a centerpiece on a side table or enhance your desk setup, redefining how you light up your surroundings.
